MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: N. Bautista; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff 992 Peralta Group is present. Represented by Loni Jackson.
Attorney Brenda Cruz Keith appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant David Bromberg is present.
Attorney Tarek Sorensen representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Elan Lambert , litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of JUL-22-13 is vacated. (D501)
